CCC-C01.description: Prevent Unencrypted Requests — Ensure that all communications are encrypted in transit to protect data integrity and confidentiality.

config.name: Prevent Unencrypted Requests
config.description: When a port is exposed for non-SSH network traffic, all traffic MUST include a TLS handshake AND be encrypted using TLS 1.2 or higher.
config.recommendation: Most cloud services enable TLS 1.3 by default.

config.name: Prevent Unencrypted Requests
config.description: When a port is exposed for SSH traffic, all traffic MUST use SSHv2 or higher.

CCC-C09.description: Prevent Tampering, Deletion, or Unauthorized Access to Access Logs — Ensure access logs are protected against tampering and deletion.

config.name: Prevent Tampering, Deletion, or Unauthorized Access to Access Logs
config.description: When access logs are stored, they MUST be protected from unauthorized modification.
